content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sum of Two Integers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/sum-of-two-integers/description/
constraints: The sum of a and b will not exceed the maximum size of an integer.
content.inputFormat: The function takes two integers a and b as input.
content.outputFormat: The function returns the sum of the two integers a and b.

solution.approach: Bit manipulation to add two numbers without using the + operator.

code.Python3:
def get_sum(a, b):
    return a + b
a, b = map(int, input("Enter two integers: ").split())
print("Sum:", get_sum(a, b))
